subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, His aid hath been received and His confirmations are more manifest than light itself. The Daystar of His bounty is apparent
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد توفیق الهی رسیده و تاییدش اظهر از نور در هر حین نیر عنایتش در ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @outward and inward meanings, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
